response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced, versatile engineer with genuine strengths in software craftsmanship, testing, and tooling — and notably has real IDE-internals experience having built C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI. However, the role demands strong Java and Kotlin expertise, deep JVM understanding, and solid Spring-ecosystem experience, none of which the resume demonstrates. Their core expertise is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang; Java appears only in passing (robotic arms) and Kotlin/Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate are entirely absent. The JVM-specific requirements are not met.
strengths: Direct IDE internals experience (C IDE at NI LabWindows/CVI)
Strong craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, large-scale and low-latency systems
Broad, proven track record across complex systems and tooling
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience
Only superficial Java exposure; no evidence of deep JVM understanding
Primary stack (TypeScript/Node/DLang) misaligns with JVM tooling focus
